name: small law offices processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small law offices processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient invoice generation causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice formatting instead of manual invoice creation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: inefficient invoice generation from time entries
